question: During an aerial photography work (airborne imagery), your customer wants additional unprepared views. Your decision is:

options.text: I switch to the hovering mode in order to implement the requested new points in the guidance system.
I switch on the GPS function to safely perform this new task.
I ask the customer for his help in order to perform the requested views.
I finish the first flight as planned, I land and will plan the new flight.

classification_notes: Aeronautical decision making under changing mission demands.
